DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, AND FOR SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL: 1) SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO DEFENDANT'S FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND INSPECTION DEMANDS WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THE COURT'S ORDER; AND 2) PAY $250 IN DISCOVERY SANCTIONS TO THE CLIENT TRUST ACCOUNT OF DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL OF RECORD BY MAY 15, 2019 IF THE RESPONSES ARE NOT TIMELY SERVED. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER VESTAL, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-11-2020 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-02-2019 Set For Trial On Mar-02-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vinnel Thomas, 510-978-0559 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Lisa T. Unger, Esq. 510-465-3922 of Rankin Sproat Mires Reynolds Shuey & Mintz for Defendant THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA.

Both sides stipulate the Judge Pro Tem

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses to Form Interrogatories, set one, special interrogatories, set one and production of documents, set one, and for sanctions for failure to respond to Discovery.

Defendant's motion is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall: 1) serve verified responses, without objections, to defendant's first set of form interrogatories, special interrogatories and inspection demands within 20 days of the date of the court's order; and 2) pay $250 in discovery sanctions to the client trust account of defendant's counsel of record by May 15, 2019 if the responses are not timely served.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Vestal, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery
Off Calendar Mar-22-2019 Continued To Apr-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Discovery.

Continued to April 5, 2019 per the agreement of parties and approval of JPT Maxwell Pritt. (email 3-21-19)

Judge Pro Tem: Maxwell Pritt; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
